components.name: Button
components.keyInsight: Actions should feel dense and calm, with high contrast fills and no decorative shadow.

components.name: Card
components.keyInsight: Cards should read as framed content blocks, relying on border contrast rather than depth.

components.name: Table
components.keyInsight: Tables should stay quietly structured, with subtle dividers and restrained state color.

components.name: Chart
components.keyInsight: Charts are the only vivid accent in the system; they carry the brand's chromatic energy.

components.name: Navigation
components.keyInsight: Navigation should feel editorial and quiet, using spacing and weight shifts over bright fills.

components.name: Sidebar
components.keyInsight: Sidebar is a first-class pattern with its own tonal system, not just a bordered container.

crossComponentPatterns.density: Compact dashboard rhythm using a single 4px spacing unit.
crossComponentPatterns.radius: One dominant soft radius mapped through radius-md.
crossComponentPatterns.elevation: Near-flat surfaces with shadow tokens effectively disabled.
crossComponentPatterns.color: Monochrome surfaces plus blue chart accents and separate sidebar tones.
